card.name: Logistics Runner
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature and draw a card.

card.name: Habitat Constructor
card.text: When Habitat Constructor enters, create a tapped Habitat token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — Create a Wastes basic land token. Choose a basic land type. Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.")

card.name: Voidic Channeler
card.text: Void — Whenever a nonland permanent leaves the battlefield this turn or a spell is warped this turn, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Thaxian Mentor
card.text: Vigilance The first other creature that enters under your control each turn enters with a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Coalition Combatant
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Thax Soldier Ally creature token. Warp {1}{W} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Overburdened Packbot
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature you control. When Overburdened Packbot enters, draw a card. Warp {4}{W}{W} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this artifact creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Starship Weaponsmith
card.text: As long as you control an artifact, this creature gets +1/+0 and has first strike.

card.name: Phasebound Lookout
card.text: This creature can block creatures as if it had flying, shadow, or horsemanship. Whenever this creature becomes tapped, scry 2.

card.name: Shatter the Void
card.text: Tunneling {2}{W} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its Tunneling cost.) Destroy target enchantment or tapped creature. Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom of your library.)

card.name: Targeted Barrage
card.text: Choose one — • Targeted Barrage deals X damage to target attacking or blocking creature, where X is 2 plus the number of creatures you control. • Exile up to two target cards from a single graveyard.

card.name: Promising Charge
card.text: Tunneling {2}{W} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its Tunneling cost.) Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Stellas Lightblade
Old-Era Starsuit
Phasic Return
card.text: Return up to one creature card from target player's graveyard to its owner's hand. Create a 1/1 white Thax Soldier Ally creature token.

card.name: Phaselight Barrier
card.text: Tunneling {W} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its Tunneling cost.) Target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If this spell was cast from exile, untap it.

card.name: Transiate
card.text: Tunneling {1}{W} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its Tunneling cost.) Exile target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: Uncollapsible State
card.text: Enchant creature or artifact Enchanted permanent can't attack or block and its activated abilities can't be activated. {4}{W}: Exile enchanted creature and draw a card.

card.name: Enlisted Ordnance
card.text: Tunneling {1}{W}{W} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its Tunneling cost.) Vigilance When this creature enters, you may destroy up to one target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Thought Feeder
card.text: Whenever a card enters an opponent's graveyard from their library or their hand, Thought Feeder deals 1 damage to them. {1}, {T}: Target opponent mills two cards.

card.name: Cosmic Study
card.text: Kicker {2}{U} (You may pay an additional {2}{U} as you cast this spell.) Draw two cards, then discard a card. If this spell was kicked, draw three cards instead.

card.name: Voidchasm Emergence
card.text: When this enchantment enters, draw two cards, then discard a card. Then if this spell was cast from exile, create two 1/1 blue and black Horror creature tokens with "Whenever one or more cards an opponent owns enters exile, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature." Warp {1}{U} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this enchantment at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Voidling Nourishment
card.text: Choose one — • Create two 1/1 blue and black Horror creature tokens with "Whenever one or more cards an opponent owns are put into exile, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature." • Exile up to six cards from a single graveyard. You may shuffle up to six cards from your graveyard into your library.

card.name: Coolant Injector System
card.text: When this artifact enters or leaves the battlefield, tap or untap target nonland permanent. {2}{U}, Sacrifice this artifact: Scry 1, then draw two cards.

card.name: Hack
card.text: Counter target artifact spell or instant spell.

card.name: Thoughtless Descent
card.text: Tunneling {U} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its Tunneling cost.) Target player mills two cards. Draw a card.

card.name: Thought Inverter
card.text: When this creature enters, scry 3. This creature gets +1/+1 for each card that entered an opponent's graveyard this turn.

card.name: Spurning Starsquid
card.text: Flash During your turn, this spell costs {2} less to cast. When Spurning Starsquid enters, target permanent's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library.

card.name: Indelidan
card.text: When this creature enters your graveyard from your library, you may put it into your hand. When this creature enters, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom of your library.)

card.name: Battlefront Sentinel
card.text: Vigilance When Battlefront Sentinel enters, return up to one other nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

card.name: Agile Cosmagician
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) When this creature leaves the battlefield without dying, target opponent loses life equal to its power. Warp {U}{U} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Accumulated Insight
card.text: Draw a card, then draw cards equal to the number of cards named Accumulated Insight in your graveyard. If you drew greater than three cards this way, pay {3} or discard cards equal to the difference. A deck can have up to six cards named Accumulated Insight.

card.name: Idiom Robber
Emergency Summit
card.text: Tap up to X target untapped creatures and/or artifacts. If X is three or greater, draw a card.

card.name: Perverted Raptor
card.text: Flying When Perverted Raptor enters, each opponent sacrifices a creature. Warp {1}{B}{B} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Asteroid Excavator
card.text: Fuel 1 (When this creature enters, exile the top card of your library as this creature's fuel.) Burn — {T}, Put a card from among this permanent's fuel into your graveyard: Scry 1 and create a Treasure token.

card.name: Fuel Leak
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may put X cards from the fuel of permanents you control into your graveyard. Target player reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it with mana value X plus 2 or less. That player discards that card.

card.name: Duskborn Commando
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) {1}{B}, Sacrifice Duskborn Commando: Destroy target artifact or creature. You lose 2 life.

card.name: Phasebound Voidling
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, target opponent discards a card.

card.name: Unak's Tragic Descent
card.text: When this enchantment enters, target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. Then if this spell was cast from exile, draw a card and you lose 1 life. Warp {B} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this enchantment at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Edict Eater
card.text: Menace Sacrifice Edict Eater: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose an instant card or card with flash from it. That player discards that card.

card.name: Duskborn Wayfinder
card.text: Superposition (Whenever this creature blocks or becomes blocked, this creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the toughness of the blocked or blocking creature.) When this creature dies, create a Habitat token.

card.name: Darkwurm Voidling
card.text: Tunneling {B}{B} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its Tunneling cost.) Void — At the beginning of your end step, if a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Exo Voidling
card.text: Flying When this creature dies, create a 1/1 blue and black Horror creature token with "Whenever one or more cards an opponent owns are put into exile, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature."

card.name: Duskborn Arrival
card.text: Choose one — • Create a 3/2 colorless Spacecraft artifact token with station 1+ and flying. • Create two 1/1 white Thax Soldier Ally creature tokens.

card.name: Concept Scraper
card.text: When Concept Scraper enters, choose one — • Target player mills three cards and you gain 3 life. • Target permanent exiles up to two target cards from a single graveyard as its fuel.

card.name: Shielded Assault Troop
card.text: Fuel 1 (When this creature enters, exile the top card of your library as this creature's fuel.) Burn — Put a card from among this creature's fuel into your graveyard: This creature gains indestructible until end of turn. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Antimaterial Aberration
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, each opponent discards a card. Warp {1}{B} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Calamitous Dreadmaw
card.text: Tunneling {2}{B}{B} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its Tunneling cost.) Menace

card.name: Bloodborn Witherer
card.text: Flying When Bloodborn Witherer enters, target opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life. Warp {1}{B} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Soarnith Surveyor
card.text: Flying When Soarnith Surveyor enters, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Corruptive Rebirth
card.text: Flash When Corruptive Rebirth enters, until end of turn target creature you control gains "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control." {B}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Surveil 2, then draw a card.

card.name: Zionnoth Undone
card.text: Destroy target creature. You create a Habitat token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — Create a Wastes basic land token. Choose a basic land type. Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.")

card.name: Twilight Founder
card.text: When Twilight Founder enters, it deals 1 damage to target opponent and you create a tapped Habitat token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — Create a Wastes basic land token. Choose a basic land type. Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.")

card.name: Stabilized Darklight
card.text: When this artifact enters, you may discard a card. When you do, draw two cards. Warp {1}{R} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this artifact at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Wurmway Electrowave
card.text: Tunneling {1}{R} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its Tunneling cost.) Wurmway Electrowave deals 4 damage to any target.

card.name: Ace's Assistant
card.text: Haste When Ace's Assistant leaves the battlefield, exile the top card of your library. You may play it until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Starry-Eyed Preacher
card.text: At the beginning of your second main phase, if you attacked with a creature this turn, add {R}.

card.name: Grounded Pilot
card.text: When Grounded Pilot enters, create a 3/2 colorless Spacecraft artifact token with station 1+ and flying. {1}{R}: Put a charge counter on target permanent you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Lightborn Shockspitter
card.text: Reach Whenever this creature attacks or blocks, exile the top card of your library as target creature's fuel. {R}: You may play a card from among this creature's fuel until end of turn.

card.name: Alliance Searslicer
card.text: Void — At the beginning of your end step, if a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn, create a 1/1 white Thax Soldier Ally creature token.

card.name: Stellastorm Knight
card.text: Flying When Stellastorm Knight enters, it deals 2 damage to target creature. Warp {R} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Reckless Maneuver
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card or sacrifice an artifact you control. Choose one — • Draw two cards. • Scry 1, then exile the top two cards of your library. You may play them until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Short-Circuit
card.text: Remove all counters from target permanent. Short-Circuit deals that much damage to target creature. Cycling {1}{R} ({1}{R}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Retrofit
card.text: Target creature gets +3/+0. Choose one or more — • Until end of turn, it loses menace and gains first strike. • Until end of turn, it loses flying and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Destructive Stereolithograph
card.text: Destructive Stereolithograph deals 6 damage to target creature. If excess damage was dealt this way, you may create a token copy of target creature or artifact you control. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Reduce Load
card.text: Choose one — • Target permanent you control exiles an artifact you control as its fuel. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Afterburner Dogfighter
card.text: Fuel 2 (When this creature enters, exile the top two cards of your library as this creature's fuel.) Burn — Put a card from among this permanent's fuel into your graveyard: This creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Autonomous Combat Protocol
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature must be blocked if able. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has "Alert — Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent an opponent controls triggers for the first time each turn, this creature gains ward {1} until end of turn." (Whenever this permanent becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.)

card.name: Excited Specialist
card.text: Haste When Excited Specialist enters, create a tapped Habitat token. Warp {2}{R} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Orbital Deployment Railcannon
card.text: Fuel 1 (When this artifact enters, exile the top card of your library as this artifact's fuel.)

card.name: Corrupted Mauler
card.text: Void — At the beginning of your end step, if a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Accelerated Terraformation
card.text: When this enchantment enters, choose one — • Search your library for a basic land or Planet card, put it into your hand, then shuffle. • Put a land from your hand onto the battlefield tapped. Warp {G} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this enchantment at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Thaxian Accomodation
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if it targets a basic land. Enchant land Whenever enchanted land becomes tapped for mana, its controller adds an additional {C} for each of its land types.

card.name: Lorren Cultivator
card.text: {T}: Untap target land. {1}, {T}: Untap another target creature.

card.name: Quenching Ooze
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}.

card.name: Lightweft Meteorologist
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom of your library.)

card.name: Tranquil Slime
card.text: When this creature enters, for each {G} spent to cast it, choose one — • Return up to one target card from your graveyard to your hand. • Create a 1/1 green Ooze creature token. • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Warp {1}{G}

card.name: Blooming Nuisance
card.text: Whenever a triggered ability of a creature you control targets a spell or permanent an opponent controls, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Twinhead Tyrant
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it has trample.

card.name: Branch Awner
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Wall Strider
card.text: Tunneling {4}{G}{G} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its Tunneling cost.) Trample Basic landcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Rip From Orbit
card.text: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying. Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom of your library.)

card.name: Infrared Camouflage
card.text: Target creature you control gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom of your library.)

card.name: Curated Modification
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control gets +3/+3 until end of turn. • Put a trample counter on target creature you control. • Exile up to one target card from a graveyard. Draw a card.

card.name: Phasic Amp Hammer
Astral Expansion
card.text: You gain 2 life. Create a Habitat token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — Create a Wastes basic land token. Choose a basic land type. Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.")

card.name: Swelling Swarm
card.text: {4}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Non-Newtonian Slime
card.text: During your turn, Non-Newtonian Slime has trample. During an opponent's turn, Non-Newtonian Slime has reach. {3}{G}: Adapt 3. (If this creature has no +1/+1 counters on it, put three +1/+1 counters on it.)

card.name: Simulated Exisistence
card.text: When this enchantment enters, it becomes an Aura with "Enchant creature put onto the battlefield with Simulated Exisistence." Put target creature card in a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control and attach Simulated Exisistence to it. When Simulated Exisistence leaves the battlefield, that creature's controller sacrifices it. Warp {1}{W}

card.name: Serraphic Furybringer
card.text: Flying, vigilance When this creature enters, destroy target nonland permanent.

card.name: Hangar Marshall
card.text: Vigilance When Hangar Marshall enters, look at the top two cards of your library. You may reveal a Spacecraft or creature card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the other on the bottom of your library.

card.name: Battery Scrounger
card.text: Whenever a creature or artifact you control enters your graveyard from the battlefield, you gain 1 life. Activated abilities of creatures and artifacts you control cost {1} less to activate. This effect can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana.

card.name: Virtuous Strike
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if it targets a creature with mana value 2 or less. Exile target creature. Scry 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom and the rest on top in any order.)

card.name: Tideskimmer Silkfisher
card.text: Vigilance, ward {1} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.) When Tideskimmer Silkfisher enters, exile up to one target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield. If you exile a nonland permanent this way, this enchantment isn't a creature.

card.name: Coordinated Offensive
card.text: Choose one — • Create two 1/1 white Thax Soldier Ally creature tokens. • Destroy target creature with power or toughness 4 or greater.

card.name: Thrust Booster
card.text: Flash Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has flying. Enchanted creature has indestructible if this Aura entered this turn.

card.name: Perfidous Gambit
card.text: Return up to three target creature cards with total mana value X plus 1 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Sacrifice them at the end of your next turn.

card.name: Oppose
card.text: Kicker {U} (You may pay an additional {U} as you cast this spell.) Counter target noncreature spell. If this spell was kicked, counter target spell instead.

card.name: Stellar Rift
card.text: Choose one — • Return each tapped creature to its owner's hand. • Return each untapped creature to its owner's hand.

card.name: Refuel
card.text: Choose one — • Exile the top card of your library as target permanent's fuel. • Draw a card.

card.name: Tank Repletion
card.text: Choose one — • Exile the top 2 cards of your library as target permanent's fuel. • Draw three cards, then discard a card.

card.name: Gusting Wavemaker
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, up to one target creature has base power and toughness 4/4 and gains flying until end of turn. Warp {1}{U} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Time-Stretched Riddlemaker
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, if you spent mana to cast it, take an extra turn after this one. Cycling {3}{U}{U} ({3}{U}{U}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Advanced Overwatch
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever this creature becomes tapped, return up to one other target nonland permanent you control to its owner's hand. {3}{U}: Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Curated Corvette
card.text: {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Stellas Revelation
card.text: Draw two cards, then put a card from your hand back on top of your library.

card.name: Calculated Maneuver
card.text: Whenever a player casts their second spell each turn, put a quest counter on this enchantment. Whenever a card is put into an opponent's graveyard from anywhere, if this enchantment has four or more quest counters on it, that player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Hyperburn Exo-Trooper
card.text: Fuel 4 (When this creature enters, exile the top four cards of your library as this creature's fuel.) Menace Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may cast one spell from among this creature's fuel without paying its mana cost. Swampcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Siege Charger
card.text: Trample When Siege Charger enters, each opponent loses 3 life and you gain 3 life. Warp {W}{B} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Sanity Spiral
card.text: Whenever you discard one or more cards, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. {2}, Discard a card: Search your library for a basic Swamp, add it to your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Duskborn Constructor
card.text: You may cast this card from your graveyard using its warp ability. When Duskborn Constructor enters, create a Habitat token. Warp—{1}{B}, Pay 2 life (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Terrors of the Twilight
card.text: Whenever a creature with power 4 or greater enters the battlefield under your control, draw a card. Creatures with power 2 or less can't block.

card.name: Distorted Volunteer
card.text: Tunneling {1}{B} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its Tunneling cost.) {2}{B}, Sacrifice this creature: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Void's Whisper
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card or you lose 2 life. Draw two cards.

card.name: Ominous Pull
card.text: Void — This spell costs {2} less to cast if a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn. Target creature gets -X/-X until end of turn.

card.name: Ore-rich Asteroid
card.text: Fuel 2 (When this artifact enters, exile the top two cards of your library as this artifact's fuel.) Collect — {X}, {T}: Exile the top X cards of your library as this permanent's fuel. Burn — {1}, {T}, Put a card from among this permanent's fuel into your graveyard: Create a 1/1 white Thax Soldier Ally creature token.

card.name: Uncovered Worlds
card.text: When this enchantment enters, discover 5. (Exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card with mana value 5 or less. Cast it without paying its mana cost or put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.) Warp {2}{R}{R} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this enchantment at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Weapons Inspector
card.text: Test Fire — Whenever another creature or artifact you control enters, Weapons Inspector deals 1 damage to target opponent. Void — At the beginning of your end step, if a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn, you may discard a card then draw a card.

card.name: Rapid Deployment
card.text: Target creature you control gains menace and haste until end of turn. Draw a card.

card.name: Planet Blazer
card.text: Whenever a land enters the battlefield Planet Blazer deals 1 damage to its controller. {2}{R}, Sacrifice this creature: Draw a card.

card.name: Ancillary Operator
card.text: {T}: Target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains haste until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Osuna Stormwaker
card.text: Void — When this creature enters, if a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn, target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard with mana value 2 or less gains flashback {0} until end of turn. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Scoric Instigator
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, Scoric Instigator deals 2 damage to each opponent. Warp {1}{R}{R} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Heroic Bombardment
card.text: Choose one — • Heroic Bombardment deals 2 damage to each creature. • Target creature you control deals damage to its power to each other creature.

card.name: Immediate Deployment
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If that creature was cast for its warp cost, it gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Planetoid Miner
card.text: When Planetoid Miner enters, create a Habitat token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — Create a Wastes basic land token. Choose a basic land type. Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.") {R}, Sacrifice this creature: Exile up to one target artifact.

card.name: Lunar Explorer
card.text: When this creature enters, target opponent may have you make a Habitat token or put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Origin's Slimebinder
card.text: Flash When Origin's Slimebinder enters counter target activated or triggered ability. If an ability of an artifact or creature is countered this way, that permanent becomes a 3/3 Ooze with no abilities.

card.name: Sown Rewards
card.text: When this enchantment enters and whenever you expend 5, draw a card. (You expend 5 as you spend your fifth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)

card.name: Shielded Priority
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has hexproof and must be blocked, if able. {1}{G}: Enchanted creature gets +1/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Shielded Brawl
card.text: Choose a target creature you control. It fights target creature you don't control. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.) As long as this is a spell, if a spell or ability an opponent controls would target the chosen creature, counter that spell or ability unless its controller pays {1}.

card.name: Instinctive Aim
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gains reach and "Whenever this creature becomes tapped, it deals damage equal to its power to up to one target creature."

card.name: Coney Commando
card.text: When Coney Commando enters, destroy target artifact or enchantment. Warp {1}{G}{G} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Sire of Origin
card.text: Tunneling {1}{G}{G} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its Tunneling cost.) Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a 1/1 green Ooze creature token.

card.name: Stellas Honor Guard
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, exile target nonland permanent or nonbasic land. Warp {2}{W}{W} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Force of Honor
card.text: If it's not your turn, you may exile a white card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Destroy all creatures that didn't enter the battlefield this turn. If {W}{W} was spent to cast this spell, return up to one target creature or enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Charismatic Chaplain
card.text: If one or more tokens would be created under your control, create those tokens plus an additional 1/1 white Thax Soldier Ally creature token. Warp {1}{W} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Unlikely Outcome
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control gains double strike until end of turn. • You gain protection from target permanent until end of turn. (You can't be targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped by that permanent until end of turn.) Draw a card.

card.name: Unnatural Stabilization
card.text: Enchant artifact or creature you control When this Aura enters, exile target creature or Spacecraft an opponent controls until the Aura leaves the battlefield. Enchanted permanent has "This permanent can't be sacrificed or exiled by triggered abilities you control."

card.name: Involuntary Gifts
card.text: Search your library for up to four cards with different names and reveal them. Target opponent chooses two of those cards. Shuffle the chosen cards into your library.

card.name: Starsquid Voidling
card.text: During your turn and any opponent's main phase, you may cast this spell as if it had flash. Each spell costs {1} more to cast for each other spell that player has cast this turn. Warp {U} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Dock Inspector
card.text: Flash Whenever an opponent would draw a card or put a card into their hand except for the first one they draw during each of their draw steps, Dock Inspector deals 1 damage to that player and you scry 1.

card.name: Force of Ingenuity
card.text: If it's not your turn, you may exile a blue card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Return target spell or nonland permanent to its owner's hand. Its controller cannot cast spells with the same name until end of turn. If {U}{U} was spent to cast this spell, target opponent loses life equal to its mana value.

card.name: Wurmway Collapse
card.text: Tunneling {3}{U}{U} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its Tunneling cost.) End the turn.

card.name: Lifestation, Emptied
card.text: Spells you cast have delve. (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Spells cost {1} more to cast for every ten cards in their owners' graveyard, rounded up. {X}{X}, {T}: Target player mills X plus two cards.

card.name: Caustic Darkbeast
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of nonland permanents. This creature enters with a level counter on it for each permanent sacrificed this way.

card.name: Zionnoth, Corrupted
card.text: Emerge {2}{B}{B} (You may cast this spell by sacrificing a creature and paying the emerge cost reduced by that creature's mana value.) Each creature card in your hand without emerge has emerge. Its emerge cost is equal to its mana cost. Void — At the beginning of your end step, if a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn, return up to one target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Force of Spite
card.text: If it's not your turn, you may exile a black card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Target player mills six cards. Create an X/X colorless Robot artifact creature token with haste named Ameliorator, where X is the total mana value of the milled cards plus 1. If {B}{B} was spent to cast this spell, draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Exopuppet Fabricator
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, exile up to one card from a graveyard as this artifact's fuel. {2}{B}{B}, {T}: Put a creature card from among this artifact's fuel onto the battlefield under your control. It enters tapped.

card.name: Propagating Darkbeast
card.text: Void — Whenever a nonland permanent you control leaves the battlefield or a spell you control is warped, create a 1/1 blue and black Horror creature token with "Whenever one or more cards an opponent owns are put into exile, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature." Warp {1}{B}{B}

card.name: Twilight Madness
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, target creature or artifact you control exiles the top two cards of your library as its fuel. Whenever an opponent loses 3 or more life, they discard a card.

card.name: Swirling Voidcore
card.text: Tunneling {B}{B} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its Tunneling cost.) When this artifact enters, each opponent sacrifices a nontoken creature. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Exile target player's graveyard.

card.name: Force of Passion
card.text: If it's not your turn, you may exile a red card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost. Create a token copy of target permanent. At the beginning of the next end step, sacrifice that token. If {R}{R} was spent to cast this spell, its controller sacrifices that permanent.

card.name: Darklight Elemental
card.text: Trample, haste Void — At the beginning of each end step, sacrifice Darklight Elemental unless a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn.

card.name: Squadron Leader
Combat Replicator
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, sacrifice up to one other target creature or artifact. Create a token that's a copy of that permanent.

card.name: Combustible Colossus
card.text: Trample Whenever Combustible Colossus enters or attacks, exile the top two cards of your library as this creature's fuel. When Combustible Colossus dies, target opponent may have you put the cards from among this creature's fuel into your hand or loses life equal to the total mana value of those cards.

card.name: Biosphere Monitor
card.text: Alert — Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent an opponent controls triggers for the first time each turn, choose one — • Create a tapped Habitat token. • Sacrifice an artifact you control. Create a Wastes basic land token. It enters tapped.

card.name: Force of Stability
card.text: If it's not your turn, you may exile a green card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost. You and permanents you control gain hexproof until end of turn. Spells you control can't be countered this turn. If {G}{G} was spent to cast this spell, draw a card.

card.name: Antimaterial Reflection
card.text: Enchant artifact or creature you control If one or more tokens would be created under your control, create those tokens plus a token that's a copy of enchanted permanent.

card.name: Genetic Germination
card.text: Kicker {1}{G} Prevent all damage that would be dealt this turn by permanent sources your opponents control. If this spell was kicked, create X 1/1 green Ooze creature tokens, where X is the number of creatures attacking you.

card.name: Gloop Thrower
card.text: Trample When Gloop Thrower enters, up to one target creature becomes a 3/3 Ooze with no abilities. Put a trample counter on it. Warp {1}{G} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Origin, Engineered Entity
card.text: Flash Whenever an opponent casts a noncreature spell, create a 1/1 Ooze creature token.

card.name: Runic Darkwurm
card.text: Whenever an opponent activates an ability of an artifact, creature, or planeswalker, you may draw a card.

card.name: Conman's Wurmway
card.text: Flash Whenever a permanent an opponent controls would enter, you may sacrifice this enchantment. When you do, draw two cards and if that nonland permanent wasn't cast, exile it instead.

card.name: Dread Ambusher
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, destroy each other creature. Put a +1/+1 counter on Dread Ambusher for each creature destroyed this way.

card.name: Kai'Kellon, Spacetime Protector
card.text: Kai'Kellon enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each mana spent to cast it. {4}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. As an additional cost to cast creature spells, you may remove any number of +1/+1 counters from this creature. That spell costs {1} less to cast for each counter removed this way.

card.name: Augur of Preparation
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) Alert — Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent an opponent controls triggers for the first time each turn, draw a card and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Voidling Sanighoyf
card.text: When this creature enters, target opponent mills two cards. Voidling Sanighoyf's power is equal to the greatest number of cards in an opponent's graveyard and its toughness is equal to that number plus one.

card.name: Encroaching Twilight
card.text: When this enchantment enters, if an opponent has lost life this turn, draw a card. Whenever a creature dies, Encroaching Twilight deals 1 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Cleansing Clag
card.text: Flash, reach When this creature enters, counter target noncreature spell or destroy target nonbasic land.

card.name: Farmworld Altruist
card.text: When Farmworld Altruist enters, create two 1/1 white Thax Soldier Ally creature tokens. {1}{G}{W}: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Voya's Apprentice
card.text: Magecraft — Whenever you cast or copy an instant or sorcery spell, Voya's Apprentice deals 1 damage to each opponent. Void — At the beginning of your end step, if a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Caustic Goop
card.text: {BG}{BG}, Sacrifice this creature: Exile target nonland permanent.

card.name: Resourceful Skipper
card.text: Haste, vigilance Whenever Resourceful Skipper attacks, you may discard a card then draw a card.

card.name: Fabricate Biosphere
card.text: Draw two cards. You may play an additional land this turn.

card.name: Stellas Caretaker
card.text: Flying, vigilance, lifelink {2}{W}{U}, {T}: Return target creature card with mana value less than half your life total, rounded down, from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Unak, Twisted Duskborn
card.text: Whenever you draw your second card each turn, create a 1/1 blue and black Horror creature token with "Whenever one or more cards an opponent owns are put into exile, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature." Whenever an opponent draws their second card each turn, they lose 3 life.

card.name: Bloodbraid Darkwurm
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, discover X plus 2 (To discover X plus 2, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card with mana value X plus 2 or less. Cast it without paying its mana cost or put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.)

card.name: Phaselight Captain
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, each creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. {1}{G}: Creatures you control gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Rhest Ko, Vaserian Dissenter
card.text: Superposition, lifelink (Whenever this creature blocks or becomes blocked, this creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the toughness of the blocked or blocking creature.) Void — At the beginning of each end step, if a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn, create a tapped Treasure token and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Unstable Replication
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice up to two target permanents you control. Create a token copy of each of the sacrificed permanents.

card.name: Wetworld Behemoth
card.text: Void — This spell costs {2} less to cast if a nonland permanent left the battlefield this turn or a spell was warped this turn. This creature's power and toughness are equal to the number of lands you control.

card.name: Coalition Commander
Osuna Stormserpent
card.text: Flash When Osuna Stormserpent enters, return up to two target nonland permanents and/or spells to their owners' hands.

card.name: Phaselight Converter
card.text: Fuel X (When this artifact enters, exile the top X cards of your library as this artifact's fuel.) {T}: Add {C}. Burn — {T}, Put a card from among this artifact's fuel into your graveyard: Add two mana in any combination of colors.

card.name: Scatterblaster
Vaserian Jetboots
Infinite Mass Cannon
card.text: {3}, {T}: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a nonland card. Infinite Mass Cannon deals damage equal to the number of lands revealed this way to target creature or player. Put the revealed cards on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Personal Phaselight Generator
card.text: Flash When this Equipment enters, attach it to target creature you control. Equipped creature has indestructible. Equip {3} Warp {3} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Hull Plater
card.text: {T}: Add {C}{C}. {2}, {T}: Put target card from a graveyard on the bottom of its owner's library.

card.name: Silent Tower
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may discard a card and pay 2 life. When you do, draw a card. {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: Scrambler Satellite
card.text: When Scrambler Satellite enters your graveyard, you may shuffle your graveyard into your library.

card.name: Wurmway Watcher
card.text: Vigilance When Wurmway Watcher enters, scry 4. (Look at the top four cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom and the rest on top in any order.)

card.name: Rhest's Reinforcements
card.text: Tunneling {2}{R}{W} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its Tunneling cost.) When this enchantment enters, create four 1/1 white Thax Soldier Ally creature tokens. At the beginning of each end step, if this enchantment's tunneling cost was paid this turn, shuffle it into its owner's library.

card.name: Starlight Shaman
card.text: {1}, {T}: Add two mana of any one color. {1}, {T}: Another target creature you control gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. {3}, {T}: Create a 1/1 white Thax Soldier Ally creature token.

card.name: Reseeded Biosphere
card.text: Lands you control are every basic land type in addition to their other types. Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Fractured Horizon
card.text: When Fractured Horizon enters, you may exile any number of cards from your hand, draw cards equal to the number of cards exiled this way plus one, then put the exiled cards on top of your library in any order. {2}{R}: Each player reveals the top card of their library. Put each permanent card revealed this way onto the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: Voya, Rejector of Prophecy
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, Voya deals X damage to target opponent, where X is its mana value. {T}: The next spell you cast this turn costs {2} more to cast and gains "Draw a card. This spell deals 3 damage to any target and you gain 3 life."

card.name: Weft-Taught Strength
card.text: Choose a target creature you control. Put your choice of two +1/+1 counters on it or double the number of counters on it. Then, distribute any number of counters on the chosen creature among each other creature you control.

card.name: The Twilight Voidchasm
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, each opponent creates a Wastes basic land token and each player exiles the top card of their library as this enchantment's fuel. Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to an opponent, you may play lands and cast spells from among this enchantment's fuel until end of turn. As long as you control less lands than an opponent, you may play an additional land from exile each turn.

card.name: Twilight Malediction
card.text: Players can't gain life. Whenever you lose life, target opponent loses that much life.

card.name: Mass Desertion
card.text: Choose target attacking creature. For each creature chosen this way, its controller sacrifices it and searches their library for a basic land card. Those players put those cards onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Overload {2}{WB}{WB} (You may cast this spell for its overload cost. If you do, change "target" in its text to "each.")

card.name: Attentive Voidwatcher
card.text: Flash Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent an opponent controls triggers, counter that ability unless they pay {1}.

card.name: Rhosha, Unbound Researcher
card.text: Whenever a player casts their second spell each turn, you may exile the top card of your library as this creature's fuel. Fuel For Thought — You may cast spells from among this creature's fuel. Whenever you cast a spell from exile, create a 1/1 white Thax Soldier Ally creature token.

card.name: Lio, Fate Unsure
card.text: Whenever Lio enters or attacks, each player exiles the top card of their library. Give In — {1}{U}{B}: Create a 1/1 blue and black Horror creature token with "Whenever one or more cards an opponent owns are put into exile, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature." Resist — {1}{U}{R}: Non-Horror creatures you control gain prowess until end of turn.

prop.type: Legendary Artifact Creature — Human Horror Wizard

card.name: Jaster, Zionnoth's Successor
card.text: Double strike Whenever Jaster attacks, create a 1/1 black and blue Horror creature token with "Whenever one or more cards an opponent owns are put into exile, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature." It enters tapped and attacking.

card.name: Shara, Chance Multiplied
Tenuous Ally
card.text: Tunneling {1}{W} (Whenever you look at or reveal the top cards of your library, if this card is among them, you may exile it. You may cast this card from exile until end of turn for its Tunneling cost.) When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Thax Soldier Ally creature token.

card.name: Imperfect Imitation
card.text: Kicker {3}{W} (You may pay an additional {3}{W} as you cast this spell.) Return target creature or enchantment card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. If this spell wasn't kicked, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Memory of a Friend
card.text: Return target creature from a graveyard to the battlefield under your control. It gains echo if it doesn't have echo, where the echo cost is its mana cost. (At the beginning of your upkeep, if that creature came under your control since the beginning of your last upkeep, sacrifice it unless you pay its echo cost.)

card.name: Disruptor Field
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature's activated abilities can't be activated and triggered abilities can't trigger. Whenever enchanted creature deals damage to you or another creature, this Aura deals 1 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Young Neoline
card.text: Alert — Whenever a triggered ability of a permanent an opponent controls triggers for the first time each turn, Young Neoline deals 1 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Dire Ejection
card.text: Return target permanent to its owner's hand unless they pay life equal to its mana value. Cycling {U}{U} ({U}{U}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Echoed Price
card.text: Enchant creature you don't control with mana value X When this aura enters, tap enchanted creature. At the beginning of the upkeep of enchanted creature's controller, they may pay enchanted creature's mana cost. Otherwise, they sacrifice enchanted creature and lose life equal to its mana value.

card.name: Nebula Harvester
card.text: Fuel X (When this legendary artifact enters, exile the top X cards of your library as this legendary artifact's fuel.) At the beginning of your upkeep, each opponent loses X life, where is this permanent's fuel. Save — {U}: Put a card from among this artifact's fuel into your hand. Collect — {2}: Exile the top card of your library as this artifact's fuel.

card.name: Void Harvester
card.text: When this artifact enters, exile your library face-down as this artifact's fuel and your life becomes 6, if greater. You can look at cards exiled with this artifact. Save — Pay 1 life: Put a card from among this artifact's fuel on top of your library.

card.name: Amelioration
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or artifact you control. Create a token copy of the sacrificed permanent. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Darklight Replication
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice up to one creature or artifact. Create a token copy of the sacrificed permanent.

card.name: Matter Harvester
card.text: Fuel X (When this legendary artifact enters, exile the top X cards of your library as this legendary artifact's fuel.) Whenever you sacrifice a nontoken permanent, create an X/X colorless Robot artifact creature token with haste named Ameliorator, where X is the number of cards among artifact's fuel. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Spell Gunger
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, counter target noncreature spell.

card.name: Energy Clag
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, counter target spell. Put a number of +1/+1 counters on this creature equal to its mana value.

card.name: Duskborn Envoy
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Habitat token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — Create a Wastes basic land token. Choose a basic land type. Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.")

card.name: Catalystic Caretaker
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Tap another untapped permanent you control: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Planet-Cracker, World Harvester
card.text: This spell can't be countered. This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters. When this creature enters, reveal target opponent's hand. You may choose a number of cards equal to number of +1/+1 counters on this creature from it. That player puts those cards on the bottom of their library.

card.name: Soul Harvester
card.text: This artifact enters with X charge counters on it. {X}{X}: Put X charge counters on this artifact. {W}: Exile target creature or enchantment card from a graveyard as this permanent's fuel. At the beginning of your end step, put all nonland permanent cards with mana value X or less from among this artifact's fuel onto the battlefield.

card.name: Deepspace Scanner
card.text: When this artifact enters, choose a player. They may search their library for a basic land card, reveal it, then shuffle, and put that card on top. {1}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target player draws a card.

card.name: Duskborn Dwelling
card.text: When you sacrifice this artifact, target player reveals the top card of their library. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — • Create a Wastes basic land token. (It's a colorless land with "{T}: Add {C}.") • Choose a basic land type. Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.

card.name: Leeching Voidmite
card.text: When Leeching Voidmite dies, target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. {B}{B}, Sacrifice Leeching Voidmite: Exile target creature.

card.name: Thirisene Depot
card.text: Collect — Whenever a permanent you control leaves the battlefield or you warp a spell, exile the top card of your library as this artifact's fuel. Burn — Put a card from among this artifact's fuel into your graveyard: Choose one — • Create a Treasure token. • Target opponent loses 3 life. • Return another card in your graveyard with mana value less than the burned fuel's into your hand.

card.name: Shifting Polycore
card.text: Shifting Polycore enters with X charge counters on it. When Shifting Polycore enters, choose creature, instant, or enchantment. Spells of the chosen type that would cost less than X mana cost X mana to cast, where X is the number of charge counters on this artifact. (Additional mana in the cost may be paid with any color of mana or colorless mana. For example, a spell that would cost {1}{B} to cast while this artifact has three charge counters on it costs {2}{B} to cast instead.)

card.name: Breach Reality
card.text: Kicker {2}{R} (You may pay an additional {2}{R} as you cast this spell.) Put a creature from your hand onto the battlefield tapped. If this spell wasn't kicked, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Curation Scoutprobe
card.text: Flash When this artifact enters, target player looks at the top card of their library. They may shuffle. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Habitat FCD
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one — • Create a Wastes basic land token. (It's a colorless land with "{T}: Add {C}.") • Choose a basic land type. Target land you control becomes that type in addition to its other types.

card.name: Wastes FCD
card.text: {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Treasure FCD
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Ameliorator FCD
card.text: Haste

card.name: Duskborn Vendor
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice another creature: Create a tapped Treasure token. {1}, Sacrifice three artifacts: Create a Wastes basic land token. (It's a colorless land with "{T}: Add {C}.")

card.name: Horror FCD
card.text: Whenever one or more cards an opponent owns are put into exile, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Spacecraft FCD
card.text: Flying Station 1+ (Tap another creature you control: Put charge counters equal to its power on this permanent. Station only as a sorcery. It's a creature at 1+.)

card.name: Birth of Starlight
card.text: Kicker {4}{W} (You may pay an additional {4}{W} as you cast this spell.) Each player returns each creature card from their graveyard to the battlefield under their owners' control. Sacrifice them at end of their controller's next turn. If this spell was kicked, return each creature from all graveyards to the battlefield under your control instead. Sacrifice them at the end of your next turn.

card.name: Thirisene Condenser
card.text: Fuel 3 (When this artifact enters, exile the top three cards of your library as this artifact's fuel.) Collect — At the beginning of your upkeep, you may pay 2 life. When you do, exile the top two cards of your library as this artifact's fuel. {1}, {T}: Put up to two cards from among this artifact's fuel on top of your library.

card.name: Stellas Umbra
card.text: Flash Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has lifelink. Totem armor (If enchanted permanent would be destroyed, instead remove all damage from it and destroy this Aura.)

card.name: Wurmway Stabilizer
card.text: Flash {1}: Put a power counter on this artifact. {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Search your library for an instant card or artifact card with mana value X, where X is the number of power counters on this enchantment, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Fas Ellor, Unak's Successor
card.text: Ward—Discard a card (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player discards a card.) The first time a player discards a card each turn, you may pay 3 life. When you do, draw a card. When Fas Ellor enters, create a 1/1 white Thax Soldier Ally creature token.

card.name: Amelioration Factory
card.text: Fuel 1 {1}: Exile the top card of your library as this artifact's fuel. At the beginning of combat on your turn, create an X/X colorless Robot artifact creature token with haste named Ameliorator, where X is the number of cards among this artifact's fuel.

card.name: Domed Crofter
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, create a Habitat token. Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Raised in Twilight
card.text: Raised in Twilight can be your second commander if your commander has only one color in its color identity. If Raised in Twilight is your commander, choose a color before the game begins. Raised in Twilight is the chosen color. Eminence — As long as this enchantment is in the command zone or on the battlefield, your commanders cost one additional mana of the chosen color to cast. Spells you cast of the chosen color or the color of your commander's color identity cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Kol, Thaxian Homeworld
card.text: {T}: Add {W} {X}{W}{W}, Discard Kol: Exile target creature with mana value X.

card.name: Baelis Prime, Lorren Homeworld
card.text: {T}: Add {G}. {G}{G}, Discard Baelis Prime: Until end of turn, creature spells you cast can't be countered.

card.name: Osuna, Starsquid Homeworld
card.text: {T}: Add {U}. {3}{U}, Discard Osuna, Starsquid Homeworld: Return target artifact, enchantment, or planeswalker to its owner's hand.

card.name: Voidchasm, Darkbeast's Ingress
card.text: {T}: Add {B}. {2}{B}, Discard Voidchasm: Exile target card from a graveyard. Create an X/X colorless Robot artifact creature token with haste named Ameliorator, where X is that card's mana value.

card.name: Eln-4, Alliance Homeworld
card.text: {T}: Add {R}. {2}{R}, Discard Eln-4: Eln-4 deals 5 damage to any target.

card.name: Hollow Exhibit
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may discard a card and pay 2 life. When you do, draw a card. {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Computation Deck
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may discard a card and pay 2 life. When you do, draw a card. {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Scorching Barrow
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may discard a card and pay 2 life. When you do, draw a card. {T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.name: Zoetic Pool
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may discard a card and pay 2 life. When you do, draw a card. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Impact Site
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may discard a card and pay 2 life. When you do, draw a card. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Gentle Pasture
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may discard a card and pay 2 life. When you do, draw a card. {T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: Basking Rock
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may discard a card and pay 2 life. When you do, draw a card. {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: Nihil Graveyard
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may discard a card and pay 2 life. When you do, draw a card. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Creophagous Wood
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you may discard a card and pay 2 life. When you do, draw a card. {T}: Add {R} or {G}.

card.name: Curated Surveillance Unit
card.text: Whenever Curated Surveillance Unit becomes tapped, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Grim Massman
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever a card enters an opponent's graveyard from their hand or library, they lose 1 life. {1}{B}: Each opponent mills a card. (They put the top card of their library into their graveyard.)

card.name: Aeronautic Psycho
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, target creature or artifact you control exiles a card from your graveyard as it's fuel. This creature gets +1/+1 for each card among its fuel. Burn — Put a card from among this creature's fuel into your graveyard: This creature gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Swelling Jelly
card.text: Ward {1} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.) At the beginning of each player's upkeep create a 1/1 green Ooze creature token. Oozes you control enter with an additional +1/+1 counter on them.

card.name: Vaserian Darkwurm
card.text: When Vaserian Darkwurm enters, put two +1/+1 counters on each creature you control. Then each creature you control fights a different creature an opponent controls. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)

card.name: Reefcovered Serpent
Relentless Assailant
card.text: Haste, deathtouch {1}{B}: Return this creature from your graveyard to your hand. You lose 1 life.

card.name: Debate Further
card.text: Counter each ability and return each other spell to its owner's hand. Draw a card for each ability countered this way and each spell returned this way.
